channel.title: Maple & Stone
channel.description: Homeware and decor for considered living

wp:term.wp:term_description: Soft textiles and comfort for every room.
The finishing touches that make a house a home.

item.title: Linen Throw Pillow
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Sink into softness. Our stonewashed linen throw pillow brings relaxed texture and quiet colour to a sofa, bed or reading chair. The cover is made from pure European linen that only gets better with every wash.

Each pillow comes with a plump feather-blend insert and a hidden zip, so refreshing the look is as easy as swapping the cover with the seasons.
item.excerpt:encoded: Stonewashed pure-linen cushion with a feather-blend insert and hidden zip.

item.title: Stoneware Mug Set
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A set of four hand-glazed stoneware mugs in soft, earthy tones. No two are exactly alike, thanks to the reactive glaze that pools and shifts in the kiln.

Generously sized for a slow morning coffee and comfortable to hold, they are dishwasher and microwave safe for everyday use.
item.excerpt:encoded: Set of four hand-glazed stoneware mugs in soft, earthy tones.

item.title: Oak Serving Board
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Carved from a single piece of solid oak, this serving board is equal parts everyday workhorse and centrepiece. Use it for a weekend cheese spread or as a warm wooden tray for drinks.

Finished by hand with food-safe oil and fitted with a leather hanging loop. Wipe clean and re-oil now and then to keep the grain glowing for years.
item.excerpt:encoded: Solid oak serving board, hand-finished with food-safe oil and a leather loop.

item.title: Ceramic Vase
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A sculptural matte-glazed vase with a gently tapered neck, equally at home holding a single stem or a generous armful of branches. The chalky finish catches the light beautifully.

Thrown in small batches, each vase carries the subtle marks of the maker's hand. Watertight and ready for fresh or dried arrangements.
item.excerpt:encoded: Sculptural matte-glazed vase, thrown in small batches.

item.title: Wool Blanket
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Pure lambswool, woven into a generously sized throw with a soft herringbone weave and neatly fringed edges. Light enough to drape, warm enough for the coldest evenings.

Naturally insulating and beautifully tactile, it is the kind of blanket that quietly becomes everyone's favourite spot in the house.
item.excerpt:encoded: Pure lambswool herringbone throw with fringed edges.

item.title: Brass Candle Holder
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A slender solid-brass candle holder with a weighted base, designed for standard dinner candles. The warm metal develops a living patina over time, growing richer with use.

Sold individually so you can cluster a few at different heights, or let one stand alone on a mantel or windowsill.
item.excerpt:encoded: Slender solid-brass candle holder with a weighted base.

item.title: Linen Apron
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A hard-wearing linen apron with an adjustable neck strap, long waist ties and a roomy front pocket. Cut for a relaxed fit and softened so it feels worn-in from the first wear.

Perfect for long sessions in the kitchen, the studio or the garden, and smart enough to keep on when guests arrive.
item.excerpt:encoded: Hard-wearing linen apron with adjustable strap and front pocket.

item.title: Woven Basket
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A handwoven seagrass basket with sturdy rolled handles, ready to corral blankets, firewood, laundry or a leafy plant. Natural fibres mean every basket has its own subtle character.

Lightweight yet hard-wearing, it brings a little warmth and texture to any corner that needs tidying.
item.excerpt:encoded: Handwoven seagrass basket with rolled handles.

item.title: Homepage
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Beautifully made things for everyday living

Homeware and decor from independent makers, chosen to be used and loved for years.

Shop the collection

Free delivery over €75

Carbon-neutral shipping across the Netherlands.

Made to last

Natural materials and honest craftsmanship in every piece.

Packed with care

Plastic-free packaging and a 30-day return promise.

Shop by room

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Maple & Stone began at a kitchen table with a simple idea: surround yourself with fewer, better things and everyday life feels a little richer.

We work with small makers and family-run workshops to bring you homeware built to be used and loved for years, not seasons. Natural materials, honest craftsmanship, and quiet design that never shouts.

Thank you for supporting independent making. We are glad you are here.
item.excerpt:encoded: Fewer, better things, made to be used and loved for years.
